<!--
👋 Hi — thanks for wanting to contribute to Lace.

This repository is a published mirror of a privately maintained source
of truth. PRs opened here can't flow back into real releases, so we
route contributions through channels that can:

  - Bug / feature / verification → open an issue:
    https://github.com/input-output-hk/lace/issues/new/choose
  - One-off patch / proof of concept → attach it to an issue
  - Larger or ongoing contribution → open a contribution proposal:
    https://github.com/input-output-hk/lace/issues/new?template=contribution_proposal.yml

See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full picture:
  https://github.com/input-output-hk/lace/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md

Please close this PR and reach out via one of the channels above — we'd
rather talk to you there, where your work can land properly.
-->

## Let's move this somewhere it can land

Thanks for opening this — we appreciate the interest. This mirror can't
accept PRs directly, but we don't want to brush you off either.

Please **close this PR** and take one of these routes:

- 🐛 Bug or feature → [open an issue](https://github.com/input-output-hk/lace/issues/new/choose)
  and attach your patch (inline diff, gist, or fork link).
- 🤝 Larger change or ongoing contribution → [open a contribution
  proposal](https://github.com/input-output-hk/lace/issues/new?template=contribution_proposal.yml).
  We'll reach out to coordinate scope and how best to work together.

We review every issue and, for accepted changes, apply them via the
internal source of truth with attribution in the release notes.

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/input-output-hk/lace/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
for the full rationale.
